title: quality-gate config
description: Schema for gate.config.json consumed by the quality-gate reusable workflow.

stack.description: Target stack, or 'auto' to detect from lockfiles/manifests.

thresholds.description: Numeric quality gates enforced by the T0 mechanics layer.

changedLineCoverage.description: Minimum % coverage required on lines changed by the PR.

minTests.description: Minimum number of tests that must actually execute (defends against --passWithNoTests).

maxRetries.description: Max e2e retries tolerated before the gate fails. Any retry is always surfaced as a warning annotation; exceeding this count turns the gate RED.

frozenLockfile.description: Require a frozen/immutable lockfile install; lockfile drift fails the gate. Escape hatch only — defaults to true.

noJunk.description: Refuse PR diffs that add banned paths or oversized binary assets.

bannedPaths.description: Path prefixes/globs that may never be added (e.g. '.omc/', 'dist/', 'node_modules/').

bannedExtensions.description: File extensions treated as binary assets and size-limited (e.g. '.png', '.jpg').

maxBinaryBytes.description: Size limit (bytes) for files matching bannedExtensions. Larger files fail.

allow.description: Allowlist of path prefixes/globs exempt from every no-junk rule.

secrets.description: Secret scan over added diff lines.

allow.description: Allowlist of path prefixes/globs whose added lines are exempt from secret scanning (e.g. test fixtures).

coverage.description: Tuning for the changed-line coverage gate.

exclude.description: Path globs excluded from the changed-line coverage denominator (e.g. '*.test.js', 'fixtures/').

report.description: Path to a Playwright JSON report to inspect for retries.

visual.description: Visual/UI oracle config (consumed by the visual lane, T2). Present + non-empty `routes` activates the lane.

routes.description: Routes/paths to capture and diff (relative to baseURL, or absolute URLs).

breakpoints.description: Viewport widths (px) to render at. Default 375 / 768 / 1280.

baselineDir.description: Directory holding approved baseline screenshots (seeded via the documented approval flow, never auto-baselined).

baseURL.description: Base URL the routes are served from during capture (e.g. a started dev/preview server). May also be supplied via the VISUAL_BASE_URL env var.

minScore.description: Minimum visual-verdict score (0-100) for a screen to pass. Default 90.

maxDiffRatio.description: Max proportion of differing pixels tolerated per screen (0 = pixel-perfect). Loosen for cross-runner antialiasing noise. Default 0.

tolerance.description: Per-channel 0-255 colour tolerance applied before counting a pixel as different. Default 0.

blocking.description: When true the visual lane fails the gate (RED); when false it runs advisory-only (surfaces the score, never blocks). Default true. Set false for repos still seeding baselines.

wired.description: Capabilities that must be wired end-to-end (not mocked). Checked by the wired/CLI lane, T4.

rules.description: Anti-fake-done static ruleset (T1) configuration. The ruleset is versioned in rules/VERSION; pin a known set when consuming the gate.

enabled.description: Master toggle for the anti-fake-done ruleset lane (default true).

warnOnly.description: Rule ids to report without failing the gate (advisory severity).
